lead_profile_text: New purchase — 1-bed Leicester city centre apartment. Evaluating STL vs LTL financial viability. Direct booking strategy and long-term profitability discussed. Special offer applied at meeting. Offer expired March 2026. No response to follow-up calls in April.
emotional_profile: Analytically minded — focused on financial comparison of STL vs LTL. New investor evaluating income maximisation options for new purchase.
lost_reason: No response after offer expired March 2026; follow-up calls in April unanswered

top_objections.text: Financial viability — is STL significantly better than LTL for a 1-bed city centre?
top_objections.zac_response: Income analysis and LTL comparison presented showing STL advantage; direct booking strategy outlined

top_questions.text: What is the income difference between STL and LTL for this property?
top_questions.answer: Income analysis presented at meeting — specific figures not captured in summary

top_questions.text: What are all the costs including Stayful fees and VAT?
top_questions.answer: Full cost structure including 15%+VAT fee explained at meeting

top_questions.text: How does the billing and owner communication work?
top_questions.answer: Monthly payout 1st-5th of month; owner access to reporting

what_moved_them: Income analysis showing STL advantage over LTL
Direct booking strategy and long-term profitability outlined
what_fell_flat: Follow-up calls in April went unanswered

conversion_gaps.gap: Lead went cold after offer expiry with no response
conversion_gaps.how_to_fill: Re-engage once purchase completes — send timing-based follow-up when likely to have completed

conversion_gaps.gap: 1-bed city centre STL vs LTL margin may be thin
conversion_gaps.how_to_fill: Lead with comparable Leicester city centre STL performance data; show real occupancy rates for 1-bed city apartments

offer_framing: Special offer applied at meeting — specific rate not captured in summary. Offer expired March 2026.
